summary: This is a brief news update post marking the fifth anniversary of Joel on Software and sharing miscellaneous announcements. Joel links to PHP upgrade instructions for FogBugz users dealing with a security flaw, mentions a job opening for an office manager at Fog Creek Software, and promotes their summer internship program. The post is a lightweight holiday-season roundup rather than an essay or argument.
key_points: PHP security flaw required FogBugz users to upgrade, and Fog Creek provided instructions
Joel on Software reached its fifth anniversary on December 24, 2004
Fog Creek was actively recruiting both an office manager and summer interns
Joel leveraged the holiday season to encourage readers to spread the word about internships to college-age relatives
money_quotes: Tomorrow is the fifth anniversary of Joel on Software!
key_insight: A brief holiday news post marking five years of Joel on Software and promoting Fog Creek job openings.
